CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-24-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Alexandra Pichette of Payne & Fears LLP telephone number 415-738-6843 for Defendant Boston Market Corporation.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT BOSTON MARKET CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend as to all claims alleged in the first amended complaint. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/HK)
